anchor.snippet: the associative property
is called associative if it satisfies the associative law
This is called the generalized associative law

annotations.label: Number of bracketings is Catalan number

anchor.snippet: The number of possible bracketings is just the Catalan number
An example where this does not work is the logical biconditional
string concatenation is associative

annotations.label: Addition and multiplication of real numbers are associative

anchor.snippet: addition and multiplication of real numbers are associative
The trivial operation x ∗ y = x
Addition and multiplication of complex numbers and quaternions are associative
The greatest common divisor and least common multiple functions act associatively
Taking the intersection or the union of sets
the operation of function composition on S is associative
composition of maps is always associative

annotations.label: Composition of morphisms in a category

anchor.snippet: composition of morphisms is associative by definition
Consider a set with three elements
matrix multiplication is associative
the minimum and maximum operation is associative
are two valid rules of replacement
associativity is a property of particular connectives
Joint denial is an example of a truth functional connective that is not associative
that does not satisfy the associative law is called non-associative
it is not associative inside infinite sums

annotations.label: Non-associative algebras: octonions and Lie algebras

anchor.snippet: Examples are the octonions and Lie algebras
addition and multiplication of floating point numbers are not associative
A left-associative operation is a non-associative operation that is conventionally evaluated from left to right
a right-associative operation is conventionally evaluated from right to left

annotations.label: Associativity implies commutativity under continuity and injectivity

anchor.section: Relationship with commutativity in certain special cases
anchor.snippet: Associative operators defined on an interval of the real number line are commutative if they are continuous and injective in both arguments

annotations.label: Strictly increasing continuous associative operators are commutative

anchor.section: Relationship with commutativity in certain special cases
anchor.snippet: every continuous, associative operator on two real inputs that is strictly increasing in each of its inputs is commutative
